# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #
################################################################################

iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    main
  HDRS
    "main.h"
  SRCS
    "main.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::io::file_handle
    loom::error::diagnostic
    loom::ir
    loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::tooling::compile::pipeline
    loom::tooling::execution::compile_options
    loom::tooling::execution::compile_report_capture
    loom::tooling::execution::execution_backend
    loom::tooling::execution::one_shot
    loom::tooling::execution::session
    loom::tooling::io::file
  PUBLIC
)

set(_iree_run_loom_platform_copts "")
if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  list(APPEND _iree_run_loom_platform_copts "-DIREE_RUN_LOOM_HAVE_AMDGPU=1")
endif()
if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_VM)
  list(APPEND _iree_run_loom_platform_copts "-DIREE_RUN_LOOM_HAVE_IREE_VM=1")
endif()
if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
  list(APPEND _iree_run_loom_platform_copts "-DIREE_RUN_LOOM_HAVE_SPIRV=1")
endif()
set(_iree_run_loom_platform_deps "")
if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
  list(APPEND _iree_run_loom_platform_deps loom::tooling::target::amdgpu::execution::provider)
endif()
if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_VM)
  list(APPEND _iree_run_loom_platform_deps loom::tooling::execution::ireevm::provider)
endif()
if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
  list(APPEND _iree_run_loom_platform_deps loom::tooling::target::spirv::execution::provider)
endif()
loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    iree-run-loom
  SRCS
    "iree-run-loom.c"
  COPTS
    ${_iree_run_loom_platform_copts}
  DEPS
    ::main
    iree::base
    loom::tooling::execution::execution_provider
    ${_iree_run_loom_platform_deps}
)

iree_execution_test_suite(
  NAME
    execution_test
  MANIFESTS
    "iree-run-loom.test.json"
  TOOLS
    "iree-run-loom=::iree-run-loom"
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)
